commit.message:
fix: avoid stuck ingress lockout

Stop synthesizing a local restoring lockout for generic zero-device payloads so HA add-on ingress refreshes do not stay stuck behind the lockout once backend startup has actually settled.

commit.message:
Add unit tests for doc-cache.ts (#8136)

* Add unit tests for doc-cache.ts

Test coverage for DocumentCache class including:
- getCachedRxDocuments: caching, deduplication, multiple docs, lwt differentiation
- getCachedRxDocument: single doc caching
- getLatestDocumentData/getLatestDocumentDataIfExists: retrieval and error handling
- Change stream updates: latestDoc updates, fallback to previousDocumentData
- processTasks: task execution and clearing
- cacheItemByDocId: cache entry creation, multi-revision storage
- mapDocumentsDataToCacheDocs: helper function delegation

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SRfcwhBthfMnTLXheFnMFM

* Fix CI lint failure: import doc-cache from source instead of dist (#8145)

* Initial plan

* Fix CI: change doc-cache.test.ts import from dist to src

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix UI/API integration: centralize API service layer, fix broken endpoints, replace CDN assets (#28)

* Initial plan

* fix: centralize API service layer, fix endpoint mismatches, fix static paths, improve error handling

- Create app/static/services/api.js with StockAPI, PredictionAPI, WatchlistAPI,
  AlertAPI, NotificationAPI, SystemAPI, PriceStreamAPI, ChatAPI + showToast/setButtonLoading helpers
- Fix dashboard.js: /api/predictions?page= → /api/predictions/?page= (trailing slash)
- Fix alerts_mgmt.html, notifications.html, admin_system.html: hardcoded /static/ paths
  replaced with url_for('static', ...) per codebase convention; load services/api.js
- Fix stocks_list.html: replace CDN Bootstrap/FA links with local static assets;
  include services/api.js
- Rewrite alerts_mgmt.js using AlertAPI with loading states and toast notifications
- Rewrite admin_system.js using SystemAPI with Promise.all(), loading states, toasts
- Rewrite alerts.js using NotificationAPI with improved error display
- Update stocks_list.js to use StockAPI.getList() instead of raw fetch()

Co-authored-by: upamanyu92 <8329782+upamanyu92@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Streamline pipeline: remove params.outdir overrides and consolidate shared processes

Task 1: Remove module-level params.outdir overrides from main.nf and all
affected module files (canoes, clamms, cnvkit, gatk-gcnv, evaluate,
feature-extraction, normalise, survivor, train, truvari). Also removed
unused outdir.mkdir() calls from main.nf and modules-evaluate.nf.

Task 2: Create modules/modules-common.nf with shared BGZIP_SORT_INDEX_VCF
and NORMALISE_CNV_QUALITY_SCORES processes parametrised by tool_annot/
caller_name and dir_suffix vals.

Task 3 (partial): Updated modules-canoes, modules-clamms, modules-xhmm,
modules-cnvkit, modules-indelible, and modules-gatk-gcnv to include from
modules-common.nf, remove duplicate process blocks, and pass the correct
caller/dir_suffix arguments in workflow calls.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: nf-multicaller-exomecnv
repository.description: The nf-multicaller-exomecnv workflow enables the calling of CNVs using CANOES, CLAMMS, CNVkit, Illumina's DRAGEN Germline Enrichment, GATK-gCNV and INDELIBLE, with SV merging using Truvari or SURVIVOR, and in silico Validation via a Random Forest Classifier

📚 Bump the dependencies group with 5 updates (#22)

* :books: Bump the dependencies group with 5 updates

Bumps the dependencies group with 5 updates:

| Package | From | To |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [@actions/core](https://github.com/actions/toolkit/tree/HEAD/packages/core) | `1.11.1` | `3.0.0` |
| [playwright](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright) | `1.49.1` | `1.58.2` |
| [@vitest/coverage-v8](https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/tree/HEAD/packages/coverage-v8) | `2.1.8` | `4.1.0` |
| [vitest](https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/tree/HEAD/packages/vitest) | `2.1.8` | `4.1.0` |
| [xo](https://github.com/xojs/xo) | `0.60.0` | `2.0.2` |


Updates `@actions/core` from 1.11.1 to 3.0.0
- [Changelog](https://github.com/actions/toolkit/blob/main/packages/core/RELEASES.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/actions/toolkit/commits/HEAD/packages/core)

Updates `playwright` from 1.49.1 to 1.58.2
- [Release notes](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/compare/v1.49.1...v1.58.2)

- [Release notes](https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/commits/v4.1.0/packages/coverage-v8)

- [Commits](https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/commits/v4.1.0/packages/vitest)

Updates `xo` from 0.60.0 to 2.0.2
- [Release notes](https://github.com/xojs/xo/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/xojs/xo/compare/v0.60.0...v2.0.2)

commit.message:
feat: add CronJob support for get_logs resource resolution

CronJobs don't have spec.selector.matchLabels like Deployments/Jobs.
Resolve CronJob → most recent owned Job → pod label selector.

- Add 'cronjob' to supportedResourceKinds in logs_resolve.go
- Add resolveCronJobToLabelSelector: lists Jobs, filters by
  ownerReference matching CronJob UID, picks newest Job
- Extract extractMatchLabels helper from inline code
- Update tool description to list CronJob as supported
- Add batch/v1 (jobs, cronjobs) to test fake client & discovery
- Unit tests: 100% coverage on all logs_resolve.go functions
  (CronJob happy path, short name, no jobs, GVR error, list error,
   extractMatchLabels error branches)
- E2E test: CronJob resource resolution with full name and short name

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Primary config method: ~/.claude/settings.json with env block
- Use ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN (not ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
- Model specified in settings.json directly
- Keep env vars as alternative method
- Update troubleshooting entries

- Add supported clients table

- Add advanced options section (custom port)

Add Anthropic Messages API passthrough and Claude model routing

- Add forwardAnthropicMessages() for direct Anthropic API passthrough
- Add Responses→Anthropic translation for Claude models (buildAnthropicRequest, forwardToAnthropicCopilot)
- Add normalizeModelName() to convert claude-sonnet-4-6 → claude-sonnet-4.6
- Route Claude models directly to Anthropic Messages API, skip Responses API
- Support /v1/messages and /messages endpoints for Claude Code compatibility
- Add model_not_supported to fallback error detection

commit.message:
fix: use PrepareForBuildDependsOn to ensure wwwroot/cgscript-cm6.js is built before static web asset discovery

The Razor SDK's static web asset pipeline requires the wwwroot/ file to exist
before ResolveProjectStaticWebAssets and ResolveCurrentProjectStaticWebAssetsInputs
run. PrepareForBuildDependsOn runs our BuildNpmBundle target early enough (before
any build targets evaluate @(Content)) to satisfy this requirement.

Also use a relative Content item path ('wwwroot\cgscript-cm6.js') instead of an
absolute path so ResolveCurrentProjectStaticWebAssetsInputs correctly picks it up
(it filters @(Content) by identity starting with 'wwwroot/').

This restores the staticwebassets/ and build/*.props structure in the nupkg that
was present in v2.20.1 but lost when wwwroot/cgscript-cm6.js was gitignored.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: desktop mode with electron-mcp RPC/MCP on port 18101

Architecture:
  cicy-code --desktop
    → Go API server (port 18008)
    → electron (official binary) + electron-mcp JS (port 18101)
    → Electron window loads http://localhost:18008/?token=xxx

Key design: uses official Electron binary (npm i -g electron),
no code signing needed. electron-mcp provides RPC/MCP server
with 50+ tools (screenshot, automation, clipboard, CDP, etc).

Go backend:
  - desktop.go: ensureDesktop(), proxy /api/desktop/* → 18101
  - /api/desktop/status: desktop mode info + tool list
  - /api/desktop/rpc/*: proxy to electron-mcp RPC endpoints
  - /api/desktop/mcp: proxy to MCP SSE endpoint

npm bin:
  - --desktop flag: start API → wait health → launch electron
  - Discovery: global electron + global cicy → bundled desktop/
  - Auto-install electron and cicy if missing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: remove cmd.Env TERM override, tmux.conf handles it

This covers all shells inside tmux sessions. The PTY-level
cmd.Env was redundant since users always have our tmux.conf.

fix: remove redundant send-keys TERM exports from all startup paths

The PTY-level fix (cmd.Env TERM=xterm-256color in local_command.go)
is the correct solution. The send-keys approach was belt-and-suspenders
that caused visible 'export TERM=xterm-256color' noise in terminals.

Removed from: main.go, setup.go, tmux.go, watcher.go, tmux_health.go
